name: Panch Poran (Indian Five Spice)
intro: This whole spice blend is available in Asian spice shops already mixed, so you don’t actually need to make your own. Panch poran does vary from region to region in the subcontinent but this is the most common blend in UK curry houses.
method: For best results, roast the spices in a dry frying pan over a medium-high heat until fragrant. I usually roast them just before using.
